arts.ttl: Preview: Norwich City vs. Stoke City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Norwich City and Stoke City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Stoke City 25-26 Home Kit Leaked
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can leak what appears to be Stoke City's home kit for the 2025-26 season.

arts.ttl: Norwich chief will stick to his guns
arts.sum: Norwich City boss Johannes Hoff Thorup says that sticking to his guns through the good times and the bad is vital.

arts.ttl: Stoke City Wembley heroes bid farewell to all-time great George Eastham
arts.sum: Eastham had been in the England World Cup-winning squad in 1966 and played for Arsenal and Newcastle United at the highest level but he found a place to really call home at Stoke City, where he spent eight seasons and helped a superb team under Tony Waddington challenge for the greatest honours in the game. Seven teammates from the 1972 League Cup final – Mike Pejic, Mike Bernard, Denis Smith, Alan Bloor, Terry Conroy, Jimmy Greenhoff and John Mahoney – were joined by a long list of legends at Stoke Minster in honour of Eastham, the match winner from that day, who died in South Africa at the age of 88 in late December.
